data.title: Discover the top 5 Ethereum block explorers of 2025 with distinct features and benefits, from Etherscan to TokenView.
data.description: In 2025, Ethereum users have access to top block explorers like Etherscan and TokenView, offering distinct features and drawbacks. These platforms provide valuable tools for navigating the blockchain and analyzing transactions, with Etherscan being a popular choice. TokenView stands out with its unique offerings, catering to specific user needs. Users are encouraged to explore these platforms to make the most of their Ethereum experience.

data.title: Weekly recap features 14 health press releases from PR Newswire, covering mental health, cancer awareness, and hand hygiene. NY, Oct 17, 2025.
data.description: This week, significant healthcare updates were announced via PR Newswire, covering mental health, cancer awareness, and emphasizing the crucial practice of handwashing. The updates were released in New York on Oct. 17, 2025. Amid the extensive number of press releases released weekly, these highlights include essential information for public health.

data.title: Erayak Power Solution Group Inc. establishes U.S. subsidiary, Nexora Group Inc., in global expansion strategy.
data.description: Today, a prominent manufacturer and exporter of advanced power solution products, Erayak Power Solution Group Inc. (Nasdaq: RAYA), revealed the formation of its U.S. subsidiary, Nexora Group Inc., based in Wenzhou, China. The establishment of this subsidiary signifies a significant step in the company's expansion efforts.

data.title: RoboUP pre-launches Raccoon 2 SE on Kickstarter, a smart robot mower priced as a gas mower, debuting in November.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on October 17, 2025, RoboUP, a leading provider of smart lawn maintenance technology, will introduce its newest product, the Raccoon 2 SE, through a Kickstarter campaign starting next month. Geared towards environmentally-conscious consumers with small lawns, this advanced lawn mower will offer a budget-friendly solution for effective maintenance.

data.title: Carter’s, Inc. (NYSE: CRI) to report Q3 fiscal 2025 results on Oct 27, 2025, in a conference call at 8:30 am Eastern Time.
data.description: Carter’s, Inc., the top apparel company in North America for babies and young children, will release its third quarter fiscal 2025 results on October 27, 2025, before the market opens. The company, listed as CRI on NYSE, will conduct a conference call on the same day at 8:30 a.m. EDT to discuss the results and give a business update. For those interested, a live webcast with presentation materials will be available to view.

data.title: Weekly recap of consumer and retail news: Target's Woolrich collection, Pizza Hut's Wing Wednesday, Saks Fifth Avenue's holiday campaign.
data.description: This week's consumer and retail highlights include Target unveiling a new collection in collaboration with Woolrich, Pizza Hut launching Wing Wednesday deal, and Saks Fifth Avenue launching its holiday campaign. The announcements were made in New York on October 17, 2025 through PR Newswire. Stay updated with the latest news from thousands of press releases.

data.title: Integrated Dermatology welcomes Dr. George Glinos to Dermatology of Miami, expanding care in South Florida.
data.description: A new addition, George Glinos, MD, has joined Dermatology of Miami, a part of Integrated Dermatology based in Boca Raton, Florida. This move aims to enhance the provision of expert medical and cosmetic dermatology services in South Florida.

data.title: B2PRIME Group hires James Wale and Aaron Brown as Managing Executives in expansion strategy.
data.description: In Limassol, Cyprus, on October 17, 2025, B2PRIME Group, a financial services provider for institutional and professional clients, appointed James Wale and Aaron Brown as Managing Executives. This announcement signifies a notable advancement in the company's expansion efforts.
